   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "df = pd.read_csv(\"titanic_data.csv\") \n",
    "print(df.head())\n",
    "\n",
    "choice = 0\n",
    "while(choice!=0):\n",
    "    print(\"1. Print the data\")\n",
    "    print(\"2. Print the statistical information of data\")\n",
    "    print(\"3. Print Randon 5 samples\")\n",
    "    print(\"4. Print First 5 sample\")\n",
    "    print(\"5. Print last 5 samples\")\n",
    "    print(\"\")\n",
    "#missing values \n",
    "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
    "\n",
    "#filling the missing value \n",
    "df['Age'] = df['Age'].fillna(df['Age'].mean())\n",
    "\n",
    "#see there any missing values\n",
    "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
    "\n",
    "#draw the histogram of 1-variable, 2-variable,3-variable\n",
    "#1-variable Age and fare\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "sns.histplot(data=df, x='Age')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "sns.histplot(data=df, x='Fare')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "sns.histplot(data=df, x='Age', hue='Sex', multiple=\"dodge\", shrink=8)\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "sns.histplot(data=df, x='Age', hue=\"Pclass\", multiple =\"dodge\", shrink=8)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
